installCommand: npm install && cd be-visible-google-ai-studio && npm install
buildCommand: rm -rf .next && npm run build && cd be-visible-google-ai-studio && npm run build && cd .. && cp -r be-visible-google-ai-studio/dist/assets public/assets && cp be-visible-google-ai-studio/dist/index.html public/index.html && cp be-visible-google-ai-studio/dist/index.css public/index.css 2>/dev/null || true
